faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in South Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: South Orange homes typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally garden spiders. While most are harmless, they can be a nuisance indoors. Our technicians identify the specific species and implement targeted treatments to eliminate them and prevent future infestations.
